name: AAR
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external supervised-AI governance and operational-forensics crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: AAR can support observable-system governance and operational-forensics comparison.
AAR can be mapped against evidence, review, reconstruction, and boundary terms.
non_claims: AAR does not prove transition admissibility.
AAR does not grant execution authority.
AAR source citation is not acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.claims: observable-system governance, pre-execution cost governance, operational forensics, systemic-risk opacity boundary
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external assessment posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: governance before opacity and cost/harm boundary
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform evidence/review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: evidence posture, review posture, reconstructability, boundary conditions
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
